description: A curated and enriched dataset for log-transormed vapor pressure at 24˚C of small molecules, intended for in silico model development. The dataset originates from the US EPA EPI Suite, filtered according to Zang et al. (2017). https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jcim.6b00625. The curated logVP dataset comprises 2713 compounds enriched with 777 molecular descriptors extracted from their 2D structure using EnalosMold2 KNIME node.
